response: No, Mina Loy and Raymond Carver are not both British writers. Mina Loy was a British artist, writer, poet, and futurist, born in Britain. Raymond Carver was an American short-story writer and poet, born in the United States. While Mina Loy had a British upbringing and was recognized in the British literary scene, Carver was American by birth and primarily wrote for an American audience.
